review_questions: Does distillation stay inside P3-IMPL-DISTILL and avoid product capability expansion?
Are semantic units atomic, mapped to existing PRD element enum values, and source_refs bound to known source intake decisions?
Are adoption decision input_obligations bound to known obligation rows?
Does closure handoff cover every eligible unit, blocked unit, and open product gap?
Do tests and full regression pass without invalidating P2 BUILD readiness hashes?
resolved_decision: P3-IMPL-DISTILL approved by Human Gate; P3-IMPL-CLOSURE remains separately gated by explicit continuation.
